# ASAI Technology
> Digital services studio in Noida, India. Premium website development, SEO & GEO, process automation, browser extensions, social media marketing, and branding. First draft delivered within 24 hours. Clients own all source code — no lock-in.

## Services
- Websites: custom-coded, fast, premium design, from ₹4,999
- SEO & GEO: Core Web Vitals, schema.org structured data, visibility in Google and AI search
- Process automation: ETL pipelines, scheduled reports, API integrations
- Browser extensions: Manifest V3, Chrome Web Store publishing (maker of AI.Reply)
- Social media marketing: brand systems, 12 posts/month, tracked results
- Design & branding: logos and visual identity
